content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: trust_boundary_bypass ⇒ header_spoof_auth_bypass
P: strip_untrusted_header("x-user-id") → prefer(session_userId)
V: status("401") ∧ header("x-user-id")
R: ! auth_bypass ∧ ! privilege_escalation
A: strip_untrusted_header("x-user-id")

[AUDIT]
Treat trust boundary bypass as a header auth risk, apply strip untrusted header("x-user-id"), and verify spoofed requests fail.
